pipeline_status.poller: No changes this run — dome site stable
pipeline_status.analyst: EXP-155 complete and integrated. EXP-156 (Part 1 Tier 3 reframing) and EXP-157 (PRED-SR-SUPPRESS inductive reasoning + literature citation) dispatched.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 4 pending reviews processed (1 critical, 3 major severity). Queue: 17 items. Mode: BAU at 240-min intervals.

internal_issues.description: Part 1 evidence roadmap falsely attributed 'Steelman Evidence Ladder' to dome model. This term is our construct from Part 6. FIXED: Removed attribution, replaced with dome's actual stated priority (prospective prediction).

4 factual errors in stratification/contrast paragraphs: WIN-068 and WIN-010 miscategorized as self-contradicted, total SC count wrong (16 vs 14 actual), counts off. All fixed. TLDR now leads with unmonitored finding.
Part 5 kill shots: V12/V13 TLDR mismatch, NMP target fabricated (<20 km/yr 2027 not in dome's published material), closing summary inconsistency, missing Polaris FAIL-001. All 4 fixed.
PRED-SR-SUPPRESS update fails to engage with 'single-observation induction is legitimate science' counterargument. ASSIGNED to analyst (EXP-157).
Domain 9 shows 'no G3+ observed' despite NOAA-confirmed G3 March 20-22. FIXED: Domain 9 discrepancy note added to PRED-SR-SUPPRESS and PRED-093 reasoning.
Part 1 Tier 3 roadmap framing apologizes for our evidence. ASSIGNED to analyst (EXP-156).

recommended_actions.action: Analyst: EXP-157 (PRED-SR-SUPPRESS inductive reasoning argument + specific literature citation for Schumann-storm coupling). Major issue — our current framing may not survive a sophisticated dome-defender challenge.
Analyst: EXP-156 (Part 1 Tier 3 roadmap reframing). Moderate — current framing gifts dome defenders a rhetorical opening by signaling evidence vulnerability.
Curmudgeon queue: 17 items pending. SEC-2b.1 and Part 1 roadmap were patched this run — curmudgeon will re-review from queue.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Our Own Evidence Roadmap Invented an Evidence Ladder for the Dome — We Fixed It
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: A critical self-inflicted error was discovered and corrected: our review's evidence roadmap was falsely claiming the dome model 'presents its own Steelman Evidence Ladder' — a term we coined for our Part 6 analysis, which the dome has never used. This is the exact type of strawmanning we criticize the dome for. The attribution has been removed.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Self-inflicted critical error (attributing our own analytical construct to the dome) of the same type we accuse the dome of committing. Demonstrates intellectual honesty in catching and fixing our own mistakes.
